creative_intent.audience: class 11-12 science students, JEE/NEET pressure, Kota/hostel reality
creative_intent.pain: too ashamed to ask doubts in class, late-night confusion, pressure from home
creative_intent.proof: Professor Curious helps explain the doubt and keeps the student from spiraling

dialogue_seed.hook_line: Bhai, kal test hai aur mujhe abhi bhi yeh chapter samajh nahi aa raha tha.
dialogue_seed.body_line: Class mein doubt poochne mein ajeeb lagta hai. Sab dekhte hain. Aaj raat Professor Curious pe daala, aur pehli baar step by step samajh aaya.
dialogue_seed.close_line: Sach bolun toh panic band ho gaya. Ab kam se kam pata hai kya padhna hai.
